title: 1 step DFU - Content of Software Update tab with Earbuds on latest FW and Charge Case on FW 5038
scenario: Verify Software Update tab shows "Up to date" when Earbuds are on latest firmware and Charge Case is on FW 5038 (which does not support 1-step DFU).
steps: Ensure Earbuds are on the latest firmware.
Ensure Charge Case is on FW 5038.
Navigate to the Software Update tab.
expected: No update is shown (status "Up to date") because Charge Case FW 5038 does not support 1-step DFU.
